moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins today at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with the world's best golfers competing for the Claret Jug until Sunday.

source.l: The Open Official Site / TNT Sports

angles.name: Live Golf Action
angles.copy: Golf's oldest major is underway! The Open Championship is live from Royal Birkdale today. Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug this Sunday?

angles.name: Local Golf Buzz
angles.copy: The Open is here! Round 1 is underway at Royal Birkdale. Even if you're not on the greens, the buzz around the UK's biggest golf event is unmissable. Catch the action all weekend.

moments.title: England Men's Cricket in Cardiff
moments.blurb: England takes on India today in the 2nd One Day International at Sophia Gardens in Cardiff, with play starting at 13:00pm.

angles.name: Cricket in Cardiff
angles.copy: Huge day for cricket fans in Wales! England face India in the 2nd ODI at Sophia Gardens in Cardiff today. Who's got their eyes on the score?

angles.name: National Cricket
angles.copy: It's match day! England's Men's team are in ODI action against India today in Cardiff. Can they take a lead in the series?

moments.title: Tour de France Nears Climax
moments.blurb: The 113th Tour de France, which started on July 4th in Barcelona, is heading into its final stages this weekend, concluding on Sunday, July 26th, on the Champs-Élysées in Paris.

source.l: Tour de France Official Site / Red Bull

angles.name: Cycling Thrills
angles.copy: The yellow jersey battle intensifies! The Tour de France is heading for its dramatic conclusion this weekend in Paris. Who's your pick for the win?

angles.name: Final Push
angles.copy: Twenty-three days, 21 stages, and it all comes down to the wire. The Tour de France grand finale is just days away. Will you be tuning in for the sprint finish?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: Season 13 of Love Island UK, which premiered on June 1st, continues its nightly drama (Sunday-Friday at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX), heading towards its expected late July finale.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Is your head fully turned by this year's Love Island drama? The villa is still delivering nightly bombshells and recouplings! Who's your favourite couple right now?

angles.name: Summer of Love
angles.copy: From 'I've got a text!' to 'Casa Amor is open!', Love Island UK is dominating our screens this summer. Are you tuning in every night?

moments.title: England & Wales School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: The school summer holidays for students in England and Wales officially begin next week, starting around July 20-23, kicking off weeks of summer fun.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! School's out for summer for many in England and Wales next week. What are your big plans for the long break?

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: That 'school's out' feeling is almost here! Summer holidays are just days away for thousands of pupils across England and Wales. What's the first thing you'll do?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Henham Park is getting ready! Latitude Festival kicks off next week in Suffolk, celebrating 20 years with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more. Who's heading there?

angles.name: Diverse Lineup
angles.copy: Music, comedy, arts, and pink sheep! Latitude Festival is just around the corner. Get ready for a weekend of discovery from July 23-26!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana turns 79 on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Santana's Sound
angles.copy: Still making waves at 79! Happy Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana on Monday. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: On Monday, we celebrate the 79th birthday of a true guitar legend, Carlos Santana. His influence spans decades and genres. Tune in for some classic Santana!

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday, Kim Carnes
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Kim Carnes, known for her distinctive voice and the hit 'Bette Davis Eyes,' celebrates her 81st birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Bette Davis Eyes
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Kim Carnes this Monday! Still sounds as cool as ever. What's your top Kim Carnes song?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating an 80s icon on Monday! Kim Carnes, the voice behind 'Bette Davis Eyes,' turns 81. Her unique sound is timeless.

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday, Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer for the iconic punk band the Sex Pistols, turns 70 on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Pioneer
angles.copy: Never mind the bollocks, it's Paul Cook's 70th birthday on Monday! The Sex Pistols drummer defined a generation. What's your favourite punk anthem?

angles.name: Anarchy in the UK
angles.copy: Happy 70th to Paul Cook of the Sex Pistols this Monday! A true punk pioneer whose beats changed music forever. Crank it up!

moments.title: Happy 60th Birthday, Stone Gossard
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist and co-founder Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to Pearl Jam's Stone Gossard on Monday! A founding member of one of the biggest grunge bands of all time. What's your go-to Pearl Jam track?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating Stone Gossard's 60th this Monday! The Pearl Jam guitarist has given us decades of incredible rock music. Which album is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, John Lodge
moments.blurb: John Lodge, bassist and vocalist for The Moody Blues, turns 83 on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Classic Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to John Lodge of The Moody Blues this Monday! A true legend of progressive rock. What's your favourite Moody Blues song?

angles.name: Timeless Bassist
angles.copy: Celebrating John Lodge's 83rd birthday on Monday! The bassist and vocalist for The Moody Blues has crafted some unforgettable tracks. Which one is on repeat for you?

moments.title: Happy 68th Birthday, Mick MacNeil
moments.blurb: Mick MacNeil, keyboardist for the iconic Scottish band Simple Minds, celebrates his 68th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Simple Minds Maestro
angles.copy: Don't you forget about Mick MacNeil! Happy 68th Birthday to the Simple Minds keyboardist on Monday. What's your favourite 80s anthem from the band?

angles.name: 80s Synth Power
angles.copy: On Monday, we celebrate the 68th birthday of Mick MacNeil, the man behind the iconic synth sounds of Simple Minds. Get ready to 'Promised You a Miracle'!

moments.title: Happy 54th Birthday, Vitamin C
moments.blurb: Singer and DJ Colleen Ann Fitzpatrick, better known as Vitamin C, celebrates her 54th birthday on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Graduation Song Queen
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to Vitamin C on Monday! We're still humming 'Graduation (Friends Forever)' every summer. What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Pop Throwback
angles.copy: Throwing it back for Vitamin C's 54th birthday this Monday! From pop hits to iconic movie themes, she brought the party. What's your favourite memory associated with her music?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of the legendary band Eagles, turns 79 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Don Henley on Wednesday! The voice and rhythm behind so many Eagles classics. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Hotel California
angles.copy: Celebrating a rock legend this Wednesday! Don Henley of the Eagles turns 79. Get ready for some 'Hotel California' vibes!

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer and Parliament-Funkadelic mastermind George Clinton celebrates his 85th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Get up for the downstroke! Happy 85th Birthday to the legendary George Clinton on Wednesday. The undisputed king of funk! What's your favourite P-Funk track?

angles.name: P-Funk Power
angles.copy: Celebrating 85 years of funk innovation this Wednesday! George Clinton's Parliament-Funkadelic redefined music. Which track gets you on the dance floor?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music and iconic performances, celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: JLo's Day
angles.copy: It's JLo's birthday on Friday! The incredible Jennifer Lopez turns 57. What's your favourite track from the multi-talented icon?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Get ready to party for Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday this Friday! From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On The Floor,' her hits are endless. What's your go-to JLo anthem?

moments.title: Celebrity Deal or No Deal Returns
moments.blurb: A new series of 'Celebrity Deal or No Deal' premieres on ITV1 on Saturday, July 25th, bringing a star-studded twist to the classic game show.

angles.name: Celebrity Box Opening
angles.copy: Noel Edmonds is back, and so is the game! 'Celebrity Deal or No Deal' starts this Saturday on ITV1. Which celeb would you love to see open a box?

angles.name: Weekend TV Fun
angles.copy: Get ready for some star-studded tension! 'Celebrity Deal or No Deal' lands this weekend. Will they beat the Banker for charity?
